def test_13_order_tab_switch(self):
        """OL-02: 订单 Tab 切换"""
        order = OrderPage(self.mini)
        order.refresh_page()
        for i in range(min(order.get_tab_count(), 5)):
            order.click_tab(i)
            time.sleep(1)
        print(f'  Tab 切换完成')
